summary: Executed backend regression and frontend integration validation for the newly added wallet-guidance/status, positions sync controls, timeline filters, settings-save activity event, and open-orders rendering on the public preview URL.
action_items: No blocking defects found in requested scope.
Proceed with manual real-wallet verification (signature approval and live order execution) in a browser with wallet extension, as automation cannot complete external signature flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://quick-fix-71.preview.emergentagent.com via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Confirmed status banner renders 'Step 1 — Connect your wallet'; Positions tab shows Sync now + All/Wallet/Orders filters; clicking Sync now does not break UI; saving settings writes a wallet timeline item ('Trading settings', status 'review') visible under wallet filter; Open Orders section renders with expected unauthenticated message ('Authorize wallet to view open orders').
rca of the issue: No new failures reproduced in this iteration.
